subcodes.first_line: O noble Khalil! In the path of trust, supplication and devotion, become thou so pure and sincere that shouldst the Most Great Gabriel [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خلیل نبیل در سبیل توکل و توسل و تبتل چنان خالص و مخلص شو که اگر جبریل عظمی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
